title: serruria millefolia
intro: Serruria millefolia, also known as King Protea, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the protea family. The medicinal properties of Serrulia millefolia include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Serrulia millefolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to aid in the relief of various health issues.
